description: Edge case EC-018 specifies: 'Click "×" on chip while tag input is open on same row → Close the input first, then process the remove.' This interaction conflict between the remove button and an open tag input has no corresponding PROP in verification-architecture.md. Without a proof obligation, this UI state conflict could regress silently (e.g., remove button dispatches while input remains open, or input closes without processing the remove).

evidence.snippet: EC-018 | Click "×" on chip while tag input is open on same row | Close the input first, then process the remove.
